items.title: Needham Highlights Vertical Aerospace’s (EVTL) Execution Strengths Following Site Visit to UK Facilities
items.description: Vertical Aerospace Ltd. (NYSE:EVTL) is one of the best emerging technology stocks to invest in. On December 15, Needham raised the firm’s price target on Vertical Aerospace to $11 from $9 while keeping a Buy rating on the shares. Following a two-day site visit to the company’s battery and aircraft testing facilities, the firm expressed […]
